title: Bhuna Egg Rolls
description: A delicious and festive breakfast dish that combines the flavors of India and the West. Crispy egg rolls filled with a savory bhuna egg mixture.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk the eggs and set aside.
2. Heat the bhuna in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the eggs to the skillet and stir to combine with the bhuna.
4. Add the egg rolls to the skillet and stir to combine with the egg mixture.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the egg rolls are crispy.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the buttery.
